title: Farm Equipment Mechanics and Service Technicians
description: Diagnose, adjust, repair, or overhaul farm machinery and vehicles, such as tractors, harvesters, dairy equipment, and irrigation systems.

tasks.text: Reassemble machines and equipment following repair, testing operation and making adjustments, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain, repair, and overhaul farm machinery and vehicles, such as tractors, harvesters, and irrigation systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine and listen to equipment, read inspection reports, and confer with customers to locate and diagnose malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record details of repairs made and parts used.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Dismantle defective machines for repair, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or replace defective parts, using hand tools, milling and woodworking machines, lathes, welding equipment, grinders, or saws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test and replace electrical components and wiring, using test meters, soldering equipment, and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive trucks to haul tools and equipment for on-site repair of large machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fabricate new metal parts, using drill presses, engine lathes, and other machine tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair bent or torn sheet metal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate bills according to record of repairs made, labor time, and parts used.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Install and repair agricultural irrigation, plumbing, and sprinkler systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
